jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.content: <p>Adyen is the financial technology platform of choice for leading companies. The Account Management team partners with merchants worldwide to drive payment-platform adoption across the unified-acquiring-and-issuing single-payment-platform.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Account Manager partners with Merchant Operations & Compliance to grow Adyen’s European merchant footprint.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Adyen is the financial technology platform of choice for leading companies. The Infrastructure team owns the unified-acquiring-and-issuing payment platform’s server-side pipelines.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Senior Software Engineer partners with Engineering and Risk Management to ship the tokenisation core that powers Adyen’s global merchant network.</p>
